responsibilities.title: Pickup
responsibilities.body: Collect orders from store/warehouse on time.

responsibilities.title: Delivery
responsibilities.body: Deliver orders to customers safely and on schedule.

responsibilities.title: Customer service
responsibilities.body: Handle customer queries politely on doorstep.

responsibilities.title: Cash handling
responsibilities.body: Manage COD collections and daily settlement.

requirements: Own two-wheeler with valid license preferred.

driver.hours: As per the Order — all over India transport

responsibilities.title: Driving
responsibilities.body: Safely operate the assigned vehicle across designated routes.

responsibilities.title: Loading
responsibilities.body: Oversee safe loading at pickup points following safety protocols.

responsibilities.title: Unloading
responsibilities.body: Manage delivery and discharge operations at destinations.

responsibilities.title: Reporting
responsibilities.body: Maintain accurate trip logs, delivery receipts, and checklists.

responsibilities.title: Compliance
responsibilities.body: Adhere strictly to traffic and transport regulations.

requirements: Valid heavy vehicle commercial driver's license (CDL).
Prior experience driving similar vehicles preferred.
Good knowledge of routes and basic vehicle maintenance.

responsibilities.title: Installation
responsibilities.body: Install wiring, fixtures, and electrical equipment.

responsibilities.title: Maintenance
responsibilities.body: Diagnose and repair faults in residential/commercial sites.

responsibilities.title: Safety
responsibilities.body: Follow electrical safety codes at all times.

responsibilities.title: Cooking
responsibilities.body: Prepare meals as per the menu and quantity requirements.

responsibilities.title: Hygiene
responsibilities.body: Maintain kitchen cleanliness and food safety standards.

responsibilities.title: Inventory
responsibilities.body: Manage ingredients and report stock requirements.

requirements: Prior cooking experience in similar setup.

responsibilities.title: Surveillance
responsibilities.body: Monitor premises and CCTV for unusual activity.

responsibilities.title: Access control
responsibilities.body: Verify and log visitor entry/exit.

responsibilities.title: Reporting
responsibilities.body: Document daily incidents and shift handover notes.

responsibilities.title: Cleaning
responsibilities.body: Sweep, mop and sanitize assigned areas daily.

responsibilities.title: Waste handling
responsibilities.body: Segregate and dispose of waste responsibly.

responsibilities.title: Supplies
responsibilities.body: Track and restock cleaning supplies.

responsibilities.title: Entry
responsibilities.body: Enter records accurately into the system.

responsibilities.title: Verification
responsibilities.body: Cross-check data for errors and consistency.

responsibilities.title: Reporting
responsibilities.body: Generate daily/weekly entry reports.

responsibilities.title: Welding
responsibilities.body: Perform arc/MIG welding as per blueprints.

responsibilities.title: Inspection
responsibilities.body: Inspect joints for strength and finish.

responsibilities.title: Safety
responsibilities.body: Use PPE and follow workshop safety rules.

responsibilities.title: Execution
responsibilities.body: Perform assigned daily tasks responsibly.

responsibilities.title: Reporting
responsibilities.body: Update supervisor on progress and issues.
